html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

The Phobic Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using Frog Legs and a Gold Nugget, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 66% chance to result in a Brew of Phobic Abatement and a 33% to result in a Brew of Phobic Abrogation.

Consuming the Brews protects the players from Sanity loss caused by totally normal bats spawned by chopping Trees or opening Chests for a limited period of time. The small Brew's effects last 4 minutes, while the large Brew's effects last 6 minutes. Both of them can also be used as Fire Fuel.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. For Abatement potion, there is chance 20% to craft 3 of them, 60% to craft 4 and 20% to craft 5. For Abrogation potion, there is chance 20% to craft 1 of them, 60% to craft 2 and 20% to craft 3.

Trivia

  • The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.

Gallery

  • All Hallowed Nights potions except for the Steeped Lunar Essence on the ground.
  • Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.

Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
“Full of grit.”
–Wilson
“It's like there's a fire in my belly.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is brave. Is making Wolfgang braver.”
–Wolfgang
“Things seem less horrifying with this.”
–Wendy
“A FIX FOR BRAVERY PERFORMANCE ISSUES”
–WX-78
“Bottled valor.”
–Wickerbottom
“A good hardy drink.”
–Woodie
“Takes away the horrors. But who would want that?”
–Maxwell
“'tis Berserker magic.”
–Wigfrid
“Makes us feel big and strong!”
–Webber
“I'm not convinced I want to drink it.”
–Warly
“Makes strong!”
–Wormwood
“Makes ya plucky.”
–Winona
“Tonic of anti-battiness!”
–Wortox
“Not scared of anything, flurt!”
–Wurt
“So that's what "liquid courage" is!”
–Walter
“Fear keeps you safe, but bravery keeps you going.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thí nghiệm Ám ảnh là một tính năng dành riêng cho sự kiện Đêm thiêng liêng trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tiến hành tại Phòng thí nghiệm khoa học điên, sử dụng Chân ếch và Thỏi vàng, đồng thời tiêu hao 10 vàng cho người chơi. Thí nghiệm có 66% cơ hội dẫn đến Pha loại bỏ nỗi ám ảnh sợ hãi và 33% dẫn đến Pha loại bỏ nỗi ám ảnh sợ hãi.
